# zendesk_custom_role (Data Source)

Look up an existing Zendesk custom role by ID or name.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) The ID of the custom role. Provide either id or name.
- `name` (String) The name of the custom role. Provide either id or name.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `description` (String)
- `role_type` (Number)
- `team_member_count` (Number)
- `updated_at` (String)
